final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a room viewed from slightly left of center. The wall is painted soft light blue with a matte finish, appearing darker in low night light. On the right side of the wall, there is a large multi-pane window with a thin white frame divided into rectangular panes, revealing a dark night sky dotted with faint stars. A shallow white windowsill runs the full width of the window. Positioned on the extreme left end of the windowsill is a small white rectangular pot, about 20cm tall, containing a green plant with broad oval leaves and pointed tips, now softly silhouetted against the dark window. Sheer white curtains hang from a rod above the window, with the right panel drawn slightly open. The floor is covered in large smooth white tiles, dimly visible in the low light. In the foreground, slightly right of center on the floor, lies a single small green leaf. The room is illuminated by soft, cool moonlight filtering through the window, casting pale blue shadows across the floor and wall. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Frame composition: the left third contains the plant on the left windowsill, the center is dominated by the window, and the right third has the curtain on the far right edge. Spatial layout: light blue wall with window on the RIGHT side, white curtain on the far RIGHT edge, white pot with green plant on the LEFT windowsill, white floor in FOREGROUND with a small green leaf on the RIGHT side. Surface materials: matte light blue wall, smooth white floor tiles, ceramic white pot, smooth green plant leaves, sheer white curtain fabric.
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph of a room viewed from slightly left of center, facing a wall with a large multi-pane window on the right side. The wall is painted a soft light blue with a matte finish, now appearing darker in the low night light. The window has a thin white frame divided into rectangular panes; through the glass, a dark night sky dotted with faint stars is visible. A shallow white windowsill runs the full width of the window. On the left side of the windowsill sits a small white rectangular pot, about 20cm tall, with a green plant growing upward — broad oval leaves with pointed tips, now softly silhouetted against the dark window. Sheer white curtains hang from a rod above the window, one panel on the right side drawn slightly open. The floor is covered in large smooth white tiles, now dimly visible. In the foreground, slightly right of center on the floor, lies a single small green leaf. The room is illuminated by soft, cool moonlight filtering through the window, creating pale blue shadows across the floor and wall. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Perspective: Frame composition: left third contains the plant, center is dominated by the window, right third has the curtain; upper half shows window and sky, lower half has floor and plant base. Spatial layout: light blue wall with window on the RIGHT side, white curtain on the far RIGHT edge, white pot with green plant on the LEFT windowsill, white floor in FOREGROUND with a small green leaf on the RIGHT side of the floor.. Style reference: Spatial positions: light blue wall with window on the RIGHT side, white curtain on the far RIGHT edge, white pot with green plant on the LEFT windowsill, white floor in FOREGROUND with a small green leaf on the RIGHT side of the floor; Surface materials and textures: matte light blue wall finish, smooth white floor tiles, ceramic white pot, smooth green plant leaves, sheer white curtain fabric.

constraints: The wall is painted soft light blue with a matte finish.
There is a large multi-pane window on the right side of the wall.
The window has a thin white frame divided into rectangular panes.
A dark night sky with faint stars is visible through the window.
A shallow white windowsill runs the full width of the window.
On the left side of the windowsill, there is a small white rectangular pot with a green plant.
The green plant has broad oval leaves with pointed tips and is silhouetted against the dark window.
Sheer white curtains hang above the window, with one panel on the right drawn slightly open.
The floor is covered in large smooth white tiles.
In the foreground, slightly right of center on the floor, there is a single small green leaf.
The room is illuminated by soft, cool moonlight creating pale blue shadows on the floor and wall.
The image is photorealistic with sharp focus and natural colors.
The frame composition has the plant in the left third, the window in the center, and the curtain in the right third.

The spatial layout has the light blue wall with window on the right, curtain on the far right edge, white pot with plant on the left windowsill, and white floor with a small green leaf on the right side.
